testcase.name: runScenario["Book a one way outstation cab from Delhi Cantt to Manali and select SUV", "Goibibo Automation - Cab, Hotel and Gift Card booking flow"](1)
testcase.system-out: @GoibiboTests @CabBooking Scenario: Book a one way outstation cab from Delhi Cantt to Manali and select SUV # src/test/resources/features/GoibiboTest.feature:8 Given I open the Goibibo website # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_open_the_goibibo_website() Screenshot saved: test-output/screenshots/step_20260419_134542.png No popup visible or already closed When I navigate to the Cabs section # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_navigate_to_the_cabs_section() Screenshot saved: test-output/screenshots/step_20260419_134553.png And I select "Outstation One-way" trip type # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_select_trip_type(java.lang.String) Screenshot saved: test-output/screenshots/step_20260419_134554.png And I enter "Delhi Cantt" in the From location # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_enter_in_the_from_location(java.lang.String) Screenshot saved: test-output/screenshots/step_20260419_134557.png Selected suggestion: Delhi Cantt Railway Junction And I select "Delhi Cantt Railway Junction" from the suggestions # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_select_from_the_suggestions(java.lang.String) Screenshot saved: test-output/screenshots/step_20260419_134559.png And I enter "Manali" in the To location # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_enter_in_the_to_location(java.lang.String) Screenshot saved: test-output/screenshots/step_20260419_134602.png Selected suggestion: Manali, Himachal Pradesh And I select "Manali, Himachal Pradesh" from the suggestions # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_select_from_the_suggestions(java.lang.String) Screenshot saved: test-output/screenshots/step_20260419_134604.png Pickup date set to day: 10 And I set pickup date to "10/06/2026" # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_set_pickup_date_to(java.lang.String) Screenshot saved: test-output/screenshots/step_20260419_134607.png Time setting issue (non-critical): Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //*[normalize-space(text())='10:30 AM'] | //option[contains(text(),'10:30 AM')] (tried for 20 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', os.version: '26.4', java.version: '21.0.9' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.56, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.57 (b4f28b5637d0..., userDataDir: /var/folders/zz/kjx9x1cx2_x...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:55653}, goog:processID: 38030, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: mac, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:55653/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.56, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 2ec9460ef259b2f09edf53644bb82018 And I set pickup time to "10:30 AM" # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_set_pickup_time_to(java.lang.String) Screenshot saved: test-output/screenshots/step_20260419_134629.png Search clicked, current URL: https://www.goibibo.com/cabs/listing?fromCity=%7B%22latitude%22%3A28.6104248%2C%22longitude%22%3A77.1141536%2C%22pincode%22%3A%22110010%22%2C%22place_id%22%3A%22ChIJjed7SgAdDTkRxXcRr625DD8%22%2C%22city%22%3A%22NCR%22%2C%22google_city%22%3A%22Delhi%20Division%22%2C%22state%22%3A%22Delhi%22%2C%22country%22%3A%22India%22%2C%22country_code%22%3A%22IN%22%2C%22is_city%22%3Afalse%2C%22is_airport%22%3Afalse%2C%22google_address%22%3A%22Delhi%20Cantt%20Railway%20Junction%20Flyover%2C%20394%2C%20Jail%20Rd%2C%20Nangal%2C%20Kirby%20Place%2C%20Janakpuri%2C%20New%20Delhi%2C%20Delhi%20110010%2C%20India%22%2C%22address%22%3A%22Delhi%20Cantt%20Railway%20Junction%20Flyover%2C%20Jail%20Road%2C%20Nangal%2C%20Kirby%20Place%2C%20Janakpuri%2C%20New%20Delhi%2C%20Delhi%2C%20India%22%7D&toCity=%7B%22latitude%22%3A32.2431872%2C%22longitude%22%3A77.1891761%2C%22pincode%22%3Anull%2C%22place_id%22%3A%22ChIJP9A_FgiHBDkRzXZQvg6oKYE%22%2C%22city%22%3A%22manali%22%2C%22google_city%22%3A%22Mandi%20Division%22%2C%22state%22%3A%22Himachal%20Pradesh%22%2C%22country%22%3A%22India%22%2C%22country_code%22%3A%22IN%22%2C%22is_city%22%3Atrue%2C%22google_address%22%3A%22Manali%2C%20Himachal%20Pradesh%2C%20India%22%2C%22address%22%3A%22Manali%2C%20Himachal%20Pradesh%2C%20India%22%7D&tripType=OW&departDate=20-04-2026&pickupTime=10%3A00&intlFlow=false&returnDate=&dropTime=&from=%7B%22locusV2Id%22%3A%22CTDEL%22%2C%22locusV2Type%22%3A%22CITY%22%2C%22address%22%3A%22Delhi%20Cantt%20Railway%20Junction%20Flyover%2C%20Jail%20Road%2C%20Nangal%2C%20Kirby%20Place%2C%20Janakpuri%2C%20New%20Delhi%2C%20Delhi%2C%20India%22%2C%22latitude%22%3A28.6104248%2C%22longitude%22%3A77.1141536%2C%22pincode%22%3A%22110010%22%2C%22place_id%22%3A%22ChIJjed7SgAdDTkRxXcRr625DD8%22%2C%22is_city%22%3Afalse%2C%22is_airport%22%3Afalse%2C%22city%22%3A%22Delhi%22%2C%22city_code%22%3Anull%2C%22google_city%22%3Anull%2C%22main_text%22%3Anull%2C%22mainText%22%3Anull%2C%22secondary_text%22%3Anull%2C%22country%22%3A%22India%22%2C%22country_code%22%3A%22IN%22%2C%22state%22%3A%22Delhi%22%2C%22name%22%3Anull%2C%22label%22%3Anull%2C%22city_type%22%3A%22Unknown%22%7D&to=%7B%22locusV2Id%22%3A%22CTKUU%22%2C%22locusV2Type%22%3A%22city%22%2C%22address%22%3A%22Manali%2C%20Himachal%20Pradesh%2C%20India%22%2C%22latitude%22%3A32.2431872%2C%22longitude%22%3A77.1891761%2C%22pincode%22%3Anull%2C%22place_id%22%3A%22ChIJP9A_FgiHBDkRzXZQvg6oKYE%22%2C%22is_city%22%3Atrue%2C%22is_airport%22%3Afalse%2C%22city%22%3A%22Manali%22%2C%22city_code%22%3Anull%2C%22google_city%22%3Anull%2C%22main_text%22%3Anull%2C%22mainText%22%3Anull%2C%22secondary_text%22%3Anull%2C%22country%22%3A%22India%22%2C%22country_code%22%3A%22IN%22%2C%22state%22%3A%22Himachal%20Pradesh%22%2C%22name%22%3Anull%2C%22label%22%3Anull%2C%22city_type%22%3A%22Leisure%22%7D&packageKey=&stopsPlaceIds=%7B%7D&loadListingFunnel= And I click the Search button for cabs # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_click_the_search_button_for_cabs() Screenshot saved: test-output/screenshots/step_20260419_134638.png No popup visible or already closed And I close any popups on the cab listing page # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_close_any_popups_on_the_cab_listing_page() Screenshot saved: test-output/screenshots/step_20260419_134644.png No popup visible or already closed SUV filter selected And I select the SUV cab type from filters # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_select_the_suv_cab_type_from_filters() Screenshot saved: test-output/screenshots/step_20260419_134653.png Then the cab results should be displayed with SUV type # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.the_cab_results_should_be_displayed_with_suv_type() Screenshot saved: test-output/screenshots/step_20260419_134655.png Screenshot saved: test-output/screenshots/Book_a_one_way_outstation_cab_from_Delhi_Cantt_to_Manali_and_select_SUV_end_20260419_134655.png
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. Apr 19, 2026 1:45:36 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 19, 2026 1:45:36 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.56. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Search for hotels in Manali Mall Road with 4 adults", "Goibibo Automation - Cab, Hotel and Gift Card booking flow"](2)

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //input[@placeholder[contains(.,'City') or contains(.,'area') or contains(.,'property') or contains(.,'destination')]] | //input[@type='text' and contains(@class,'search')] | (//input[@type='text'])[1] (tried for 20 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', os.version: '26.4', java.version: '21.0.9' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.56, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.57 (b4f28b5637d0..., userDataDir: /var/folders/zz/kjx9x1cx2_x...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:55748}, goog:processID: 38182, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: mac, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:55748/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.56, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: f8257440769c4e9f35606a0a62fdc94b

testcase.system-out:
@GoibiboTests @HotelBooking Scenario: Search for hotels in Manali Mall Road with 4 adults # src/test/resources/features/GoibiboTest.feature:23 Given I open the Goibibo website # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_open_the_goibibo_website() Screenshot saved: test-output/screenshots/step_20260419_134700.png When I navigate to the Hotels section # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_navigate_to_the_hotels_section() Screenshot saved: test-output/screenshots/step_20260419_134703.png And I enter "Manali Mall Road" in hotel search # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_enter_in_hotel_search(java.lang.String) org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //input[@placeholder[contains(.,'City') or contains(.,'area') or contains(.,'property') or contains(.,'destination')]] | //input[@type='text' and contains(@class,'search')] | (//input[@type='text'])[1] (tried for 20 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', com.goibibo.pages.HotelsPage.enterHotelLocation(HotelsPage.java:53) at com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_enter_in_hotel_search(GoibiboStepDefs.java:132) at ✽.I enter "Manali Mall Road" in hotel search(file:///Users/shoebiqbal/Desktop/cucumberBDD/travelingSite-AutomationTesting/goibibo-automation/src/test/resources/features/GoibiboTest.feature:25)
Screenshot saved: test-output/screenshots/step_20260419_134724.png And I select "Mall Road, Manali" from hotel suggestions # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_select_from_hotel_suggestions(java.lang.String) And I set hotel check-in date to "11/06/2026" # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_set_hotel_check_in_date_to(java.lang.String) And I set hotel check-out date to "15/06/2026" # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_set_hotel_check_out_date_to(java.lang.String) And I set number of adults to 4 # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_set_number_of_adults_to(int) And I click Search for hotels # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_click_search_for_hotels() Then the hotel results page should be displayed # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.the_hotel_results_page_should_be_displayed() Screenshot saved: test-output/screenshots/Search_for_hotels_in_Manali_Mall_Road_with_4_adults_end_20260419_134724.png

testcase.name: runScenario["Navigate to Gift Cards from the login menu", "Goibibo Automation - Cab, Hotel and Gift Card booking flow"](3)

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //span[contains(text(),'Login')] (tried for 20 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', os.version: '26.4', java.version: '21.0.9' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.56, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.57 (b4f28b5637d0..., userDataDir: /var/folders/zz/kjx9x1cx2_x...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:55777}, goog:processID: 38285, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: mac, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:55777/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.56, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: cedc841d4595f9ec3d952e473eee3ff5

testcase.system-out:
@GoibiboTests @GiftCard Scenario: Navigate to Gift Cards from the login menu # src/test/resources/features/GoibiboTest.feature:34 Given I open the Goibibo website # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_open_the_goibibo_website() Screenshot saved: test-output/screenshots/step_20260419_134735.png When I click on the Login Signup button # Screenshot saved: test-output/screenshots/step_20260419_134756.png Then I should see the Gift Cards option in the menu # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_should_see_the_gift_cards_option_in_the_menu() And I click on Gift Cards # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.i_click_on_gift_cards() Then the Gift Cards page should be displayed # com.goibibo.stepDefs.GoibiboStepDefs.the_gift_cards_page_should_be_displayed() Screenshot saved: test-output/screenshots/Navigate_to_Gift_Cards_from_the_login_menu_end_20260419_134756.png

You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
